message:
feat(web): add persistent checked services state for accounts wizard

Add useCheckedServices() hook using the same TanStack Query pattern
as other user preferences, backed by localStorage under the
agent-flywheel-checked-services key.

- Add getCheckedServices/setCheckedServices persistence functions
- Add useCheckedServices hook with toggle semantics (add/remove from set)
- Register checkedServices in userPreferencesKeys
- Import useCheckedServices in accounts wizard page
- Add useMemo import for accounts page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
